key_risks: CRITICAL: Malicious signature: Environment variable exfiltration (P5)

findings.title: Shell command execution (shell=True)
findings.description: Code calls subprocess.run() which can execute arbitrary system commands
findings.remediation: Use subprocess.run() with explicit argument list. Avoid shell=True. Never pass untrusted input.
